worktree_state.content:
<%# ============================================================================ FOOTER COMPONENT - Example Theme ============================================================================ Simple footer with restaurant info and E-Menum branding. PROPS (passed via include): - organization: Organization object {name, logo, address, phone, ...} - menu: Current menu object RULES: 1. Always show E-Menum branding (required by terms of service) 2. Use CSS variables for all colors 3. Use t() for all text strings 4. Include legal links (Privacy, Terms) %>
<% if (locals.organization) { %>

<%= organization.name %>

<% if (organization.address) { %>

<%= organization.address %>

<% } %>
<% if (organization.phone) { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.call') : 'Call' %> <% } %> <% if (organization.whatsapp) { %> WhatsApp <% } %>
<% } %> <% if (locals.menu && menu.showAllergenNotice !== false) { %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('menu.allergenNotice') : 'Please inform our staff of any food allergies or dietary requirements before ordering.' %>

<% } %>
<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.poweredBy') : 'Powered by' %> E-Menum

© <%= new Date().getFullYear() %> <%= locals.organization ? organization.name : 'E-Menum' %>. <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.allRightsReserved') : 'All rights reserved.' %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('nav.privacy') : 'Privacy Policy' %> · <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('nav.terms') : 'Terms of Service' %>
